description: Make your AI coding agent self-improving. Every mistake it makes becomes a prevention rule. Every correction you give makes it permanently smarter. ThumbGate turns feedback into enforcement — your agent gets better with every session, not just every model update. 👍 Thumbs up keeps good fixes reusable. 👎 Thumbs down blocks repeated mistakes. Human-in-the-loop teams get history-aware lessons. Team adds shared lessons and org visibility.
